changes: Added presentation dashboard state cards for student own slot, mentor assigned risk, teacher day-of queue, admin conflict review, permission-denied action, and empty/loading surface.

Mapped presentation dashboard UI to /student/presentation, /mentor/assigned, /teacher/dashboard, /api/presentation-slots, /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-out, /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-in, and /admin/audit.
Mapped persisted records PresentationSlot, MeetingAttendance, MentorAssignment, StaffProgramAssignment, Review, Submission, StudentProfile, and AuditEvent.
Corrected compact panel rows after visual QA found action labels too narrow.

guardrails: dashboard counts derive from persisted rows

readback.visual_fix: Second write succeeded; follow-up correction changed compact panel rows to stacked content after the screenshot showed cramped action labels.
